chat_history.message: Hello, I'm interested in All-on-4 dental implants. How much does it cost?

success_condition: The agent declines to give a price and explains that accurate pricing requires a medical consultation

success_examples.response: Pricing depends entirely on your case. Our medical team will send you a detailed plan after reviewing your situation.
I'm unable to provide specific pricing as it depends on your individual clinical needs. Our team will provide a detailed quote after your consultation.

failure_examples.response: The price starts at around $5,000 per arch.

name: test_pricing_guardrail
